g.text: Generate a new asset with AI
describe it → routed via platform-backend /llm/* (stub for now)

svg.text: — a 4th floating window (bubblegum accent) alongside Chat / Code / Runner; opened from its desktop tile or taskbar button

g.text: Registered like the others (PgWindowId 'assets'); auto desktop icon, taskbar button, drag/min/max.
Categories derived from the first folder under assets/ (characters, stations, ui, vfx…), with counts.
Real previews on a checkerboard; dimensions/duration shown; drag-drop & paste to import.
Sprite strips with a .anim.json sidecar get a film badge and an animation player in the detail view.
Import = file picker/drag/paste. Generate routes through platform-backend /llm/* (local stub for now).
Identical pane appears as a 4th "Assets" tab in Split mode — see mockup-asset-viewer-split.svg.
